jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aptech - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
